caveats: This prior is drawn from the NHD mainstem candidate, so it will agree with stationing by construction.
It does not identify actual visible water, shelves, side channels, islands, eddies, holes, or seasonal wetted width.
The current pilot bbox clips a few downstream station samples because the NHD source extract preserved whole features near the bbox edge.
promotion_gates: Use only as an editor overlay or mask-generation prior until reviewed banks and orthomosaic masks exist.
Do not replace the source-derived water mask or accept geometry from this prior alone.
Compare against NAIP, DEM relief, NHD waterbodies, CDEC flow context, and guide notes before deriving production wetted width.
